questionHtml: Outline why, unlike typical transition metals, zinc compounds are not coloured.
markschemeHtml:
« Zn2+» has a full d-shell
OR
does not form « ions with» an incomplete d-shell ✔


Do not accept “Zn is not a transition metal”.

Do not accept zinc atoms for zinc ions.

meta.title: Outline why, unlike typical transition metals, zinc compounds are not coloured.
